BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"0. I get as much pleasure as I ever did from the things I enjoy.","Q4":"0. I don't feel particularly guilty.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"1-.
